summary: Completed comprehensive testing of English Teachers Planner - All requested features verified working correctly. Backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all flows working). The fixes for reading/mediation objectives, project selection/display, and DOCX export are all functioning properly.
passed_tests: ✓ Specific objectives generated for all 5 skills (listening, reading, speaking, writing, mediation)
✓ Official projects endpoint returns exactly 3 projects per scenario
✓ Selected project appears in generated planner response with all fields
✓ Project displayed in PreviewPage with name, category, overview, objectives, activities, rubric
✓ DOCX export includes 'Official Project (Lesson 5 - Backward Planning)' section
✓ DOCX export includes project name, general objective, specific objectives, activities, rubric criteria
✓ All 5 lesson planners generated (one per skill)
✓ All API endpoints return correct status codes
✓ Frontend navigation and form interactions work correctly
✓ Edit mode and save changes functionality working
seed_data_creation: None - used existing grade 1 data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the bug fix request are working correctly: 1) Reading and mediation objectives are now generated with meaningful content, 2) Project selection works and project data appears in the response, 3) Project is displayed in PreviewPage with all fields (name, category, overview, objectives, activities, rubric), 4) DOCX export includes a dedicated 'Official Project (Lesson 5 - Backward Planning)' section with all project details, 5) Project selector label shows 'Proyecto Oficial (Lección 5)' as requested.

features_verified.specific_objectives_5_skills: PASS - All 5 skills (listening, reading, speaking, writing, mediation) have meaningful SMART objectives
features_verified.project_selector_3_projects: PASS - Selector shows 3 official projects per scenario
features_verified.project_in_response: PASS - Selected project appears in API response with all fields
features_verified.project_in_preview: PASS - Project section displayed with name, category, overview, objectives, activities, rubric
features_verified.project_in_docx_export: PASS - DOCX includes dedicated project section with all details
